tasks.description: Go to the website and click 'Desktop' then click 'Download'.

tasks.task: Wait for download completion of ISO file.
tasks.description: The system will download a file with .ISO extension. Wait for it to complete downloading.

tasks.task: If desired, donate through the website for free downloading or use not now option.
tasks.description: Choose between donating or accepting 'not now' on the page and proceed with download.

tasks.task: Prepare virtual machine environment (software such as VirtualBox)
tasks.description: Ensure your virtual machine software is installed. Set up a new virtual machine for Linux installation if not already done.

tasks.task: Create virtual disk image of Auntu ISO file in the virtual machine's environment.
tasks.description: Convert downloaded .ISO file to raw format that can be used as an installer within a virtual machine. This usually involves mounting the ISO and then copying its contents (files, etc.) to a VDI or VHD type of image.

tasks.task: Install Auntu on the virtual machine using created disk image.
tasks.description: Launch VirtualBox and create a new VM. Choose Debian or another Linux distribution compatible with your setup (e.g., Auntu). Use the raw .ISO file to boot/install from within the guest OS.

tasks.task: Once installed, explore core Linux concepts.
tasks.description: Learn basic Linux commands and operations after installation. Understand system files, directories, and use tools like Terminal or Bash for automation tasks.
